name: claude-yandex-skills
description: Скиллы для работы с экосистемой Яндекса через единый OAuth (приложение Я-Клауд-Клиентс): Метрика, Вебмастер, Wordstat, Директ, Аудитории, Формы, Календарь, Почта, Диск, Телемост, Трекер, Боты, 360 Admin, Мессенджер.

plugins.name: yandex-auth
plugins.description: Unified OAuth flow for all Yandex APIs (single token covering all scopes the user enabled in their Yandex OAuth app)

plugins.name: yandex-metrika
plugins.description: Web/app analytics: traffic, conversions, UTM, SE breakdown, goals, funnels.

plugins.name: yandex-webmaster
plugins.description: Site management: indexing, queries, sitemaps, recrawl, links, feeds.

plugins.name: yandex-wordstat
plugins.description: Search demand and keyword research (NB: scope requires manual approval from Yandex).

plugins.name: yandex-direct
plugins.description: Ads: campaigns, groups, keywords, reports, ORD documents.

plugins.name: yandex-audience
plugins.description: Audience segments for VK Ads / Direct retargeting.

plugins.name: yandex-disk
plugins.description: Files via REST API (and WebDAV fallback).

plugins.name: yandex-telemost
plugins.description: Video meetings: schedule, list, join links.

plugins.name: yandex-360-admin
plugins.description: Yandex 360 organisation admin: users, domains, audit.
